channel.title: Reconnaissance on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Reconnaissance on simeononsecurity

item.title: CompTIA PenTest+ (PT0-003): Reconnaissance and Enumeration
item.category: "CompTIA PenTest+ Course" , "Penetration Testing" , "Reconnaissance" , "Enumeration" , "OSINT" , "Ethical Hacking" , "Offensive Security" , "Information Gathering" , "Security Testing" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master reconnaissance and enumeration for the CompTIA PenTest+ PT0-003 exam. Learn OSINT, active and passive recon, enumeration techniques, secrets discovery, and the right tools.

item.title: CompTIA PenTest+ Course: Complete Study Guide for the PT0-003 Exam
item.category: "CompTIA PenTest+ Course" , "Penetration Testing" , "Ethical Hacking" , "Offensive Security" , "Vulnerability Assessment" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Red Team" , "Exploitation" , "Security Testing" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: A comprehensive CompTIA PenTest+ (PT0-003) study course covering engagement management, reconnaissance and enumeration, vulnerability discovery, attacks and exploits, and post-exploitation and lateral movement.

item.title: EC-Council CEH Course: Complete Study Guide for the Certified Ethical Hacker v13 Exam
item.category: "CEH Course" , "Certified Ethical Hacker" , "Ethical Hacking" , "Penetration Testing" , "EC-Council Certification" , "Network Security" , "Web Application Security" , "Malware Analysis" , "Social Engineering" , "Cryptography"
item.description: A comprehensive EC-Council Certified Ethical Hacker (CEH v13) study course covering all 20 modules: ethical hacking methodology, footprinting, scanning, enumeration, system hacking, malware, web attacks, wireless attacks, cloud security, and cryptography.

item.title: Mastering Penetration Testing: Advanced Techniques and Real-World Examples for Cybersecurity Professionals
item.category: "Cybersecurity" , "Penetration Testing" , "Ethical Hacking" , "Network Security" , "Web Application Security" , "Wireless Security" , "Social Engineering" , "Mobile Application Security" , "Cloud Security" , "Career Development"
item.description: Explore advanced techniques, tools, and real-world examples in mastering penetration testing to enhance your cybersecurity skills and career.

item.title: CompTIA PenTest+ Practice Test - SimeonOnSecurity
item.description: Prepare for the CompTIA PenTest+ (PT0-003) exam with our comprehensive practice test. Test your knowledge of engagement management, reconnaissance and enumeration, vulnerability discovery, attacks and exploits, and post-exploitation.
